hero.title: Private photo and video vault
hero.subtitle: Move private media into a separate vault protected by password, biometrics, and disguised access. Back up, transfer, save, and cast your personal videos with less friction.
hero.imageAlt: VideoSafe private photo and video vault

features.title: Core features
features.subtitle: A focused vault for protecting, organizing, and saving your private photos and videos.

items.title: Separate private vault
items.description: Import photos and videos into a dedicated space separated from your system gallery to reduce accidental viewing and sharing.

items.title: Password and biometrics
items.description: Unlock with your password or biometric verification so private content stays visible only to you.

items.title: Disguised access and intruder capture
items.description: Use a disguised icon and record suspicious unlock attempts so the app draws less attention.

more.title: More useful tools
more.subtitle: From saving to migration, the extra tools are built around private media management.
items: Detection for common video links and streaming resources
Cast videos to TVs and other large screens

download.title: Download VideoSafe
download.subtitle: The Android version is live on Google Play. The iOS version is still in development.
download.note: Use Google Play to get the current available version.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: A few quick answers before you download.

items.question: Does VideoSafe upload my private content to a server?
items.answer: Core privacy protection happens on your device. Backup is something you choose to run with options such as Google Drive.

items.question: Can I manage photos and videos separately from the system gallery?
items.answer: Yes. VideoSafe is built to import private photos and videos into a separate vault for viewing, sorting, and management.

items.question: Is iOS supported now?
items.answer: The Android version is available now, and the iOS version is still in development.
